grade_a_criteria.description: ALL layers satisfied. Every concept aligned.

layer_checklist.layer_0: IPDA context known + quarterly shift direction aligned + no adverse seasonal pattern
layer_checklist.layer_1: HTF structure + dealing range + liquidity levels + session levels (PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL) all clear
layer_checklist.layer_2: Correct premium/discount zone + active kill zone + PO3 in distribution phase + daily bias aligned + intraday profile identified
layer_checklist.layer_3: Confirmed liquidity sweep + displacement + CISD or CHoCH + optional SMT divergence
layer_checklist.layer_4: Valid OB + FVG at entry zone, preferably stacked. Propulsion block = best. Volume profile confirms HVN at zone.
layer_checklist.layer_5: Entry at OTE (0.618-0.786) within OB/FVG. Fibonacci extensions set TP2/TP3. Volume profile validates level.

grade_b_criteria.description: Missing 1-2 elements from layers 2-5. Layer 1 MUST be satisfied.

grade_c_criteria.description: Multiple gaps. Layer 1 satisfied but layers 3-5 incomplete.

grade_d_skip.description: Layer 1 NOT satisfied (HTF against direction) OR no liquidity event AND no FVG/OB.
